readings.Aries: Action is your native language. But some of the most important things can only be said quietly. One conversation today matters more than the rest combined.
readings.Taurus: The appetite you're ignoring is not going away. Give it something real. You already have what you need to take the next step.
readings.Gemini: The conversation you've been avoiding will be easier than you think and harder to forget. The connection you almost didn't make is the one that matters.
readings.Cancer: The boundary you're reluctant to draw is the one you most need. The question matters more than the answer right now.
readings.Leo: Your joy is contagious and you've been keeping it to yourself. Release some of it. Make contact with the actual person rather than the version in your head.
readings.Virgo: The research phase of this decision is complete. The decision phase requires something research can't provide. The connection you almost didn't make is the one that matters.
readings.Libra: The position you hold in other people's lives is one of grace. Don't let it become one of function. Something is about to become obvious.
readings.Scorpio: Something you decided a long time ago is governing today. It may not still be correct. Notice what hasn't changed, not just what has.
readings.Sagittarius: The question you're asking is good. The answer you're expecting is limiting the search. Simpler is correct here.
readings.Capricorn: There is warmth in you that your efficiency sometimes buries. Let it surface. There's more support available than you've asked for.
readings.Aquarius: Something you dismissed as conventional might contain what you need. Examine it without prejudice. There's more support available than you've asked for.
readings.Pisces: The spiritual dimension of what you're experiencing is real. Trust that frame alongside the practical one. Something you've been measuring incorrectly just corrected itself.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You're both good at starting things. One of you will have to become better at finishing them.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You recognised each other immediately. Whether that's good news depends entirely on what you recognised.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: Intellectually, this is effortless. Emotionally, you're both still waiting for the other to go first.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: There's real joy between you when you're moving. The stillness is harder for both of you, and necessary.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
